name: @penpot/server
description: Penpot backend — Node.js with SQLite, functional parity with Clojure backend

scripts.lint: node -e "const{readdirSync}=require('fs');const{join}=require('path');const{execSync}=require('child_process');const files=(d)=>readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true}).flatMap(f=>f.isDirectory()?files(join(d,f.name)):[join(d,f.name)]);let fail=0;for(const f of files('src').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.js'))){try{execSync('node --check '+JSON.stringify(f),{stdio:'pipe'})}catch(e){console.error('FAIL:',f);fail++}};if(!fail)console.log('All '+files('src').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.js')).length+' source files passed syntax check');else process.exit(1)
